home.name: Pierre Souza
home.bio: I create modern, accessible, and performant interfaces, focused on the best user experience. I work with Next.js, React, TypeScript, and Tailwind, always applying best practices and attention to detail.
home.featuredProjectsDescription: A preview of some recent work. See all on the projects page.

about.title: About
about.description: Focused on creating accessible, performant interfaces with great user experience. Working with React/Next.js, TypeScript, and modern styling (Tailwind and Styled Components). Interest in design systems, testing, and UI best practices.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Some projects I've developed and maintain. Filter by technology or search by name.

biocidade.name: Biocidade
biocidade.description: Biocidade is a platform for mapping green areas and environmental preservation, developed as an Integrative Project for the Fullstack JavaScript Development course at Generation Brasil.

capsync.name: CapSync
capsync.description: Capsync is a project management platform to facilitate team communication and organization, developed during the First Hackathon of the Bichinhos da TI Community.

descoinvest.name: Desco Invest
descoinvest.description: Desco Invest is an investment platform that democratizes access to financial knowledge, using artificial intelligence to make learning more accessible and practical.

portfolio.name: Portfolio
portfolio.description: Portfolio developed with Next.js, Tailwind CSS and Typescript, with the purpose of presenting my projects and skills as a Front-End developer.

rocketvisuals.name: Rocket Visuals
rocketvisuals.description: Rocket Visuals is a video production company specialized in VFX and motion design, transforming ideas into impactful visual experiences that elevate communication and generate real results for brands and companies.

seikopartners.name: Seiko Partners
seikopartners.description: Institutional website developed for Seiko Partners, a business consulting company focused on innovative solutions for their clients.

cinesefilmes.name: Cinese Filmes
cinesefilmes.description: Institutional website developed for Cinese Filmes, an audiovisual content production company.

powermanutencao.name: Power Manutenção
powermanutencao.description: Institutional website developed for Power Manutenção, a company specializing in automotive maintenance, offering electronic reprogramming services (Remap), truck and agricultural mechanics, engine rectification, and air conditioning.

job0.company: Municipal Department of Urban Planning and Licensing
job0.description: I work on developing and evolving modern and scalable web applications using Next.js, TypeScript, and Prisma. My core responsibility is to develop efficient, secure solutions with total focus on user experience.

job1.description: I work on developing a SaaS focused on auditing AI and cloud infrastructure costs, aiming to democratize access to FinOps for startups.

job2.description: Junior Web Developer with experience in Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Shadcn UI, and Animate on Scroll, working on creating modern and responsive landing pages.

job3.description: I work as a WordPress developer, responsible for creating and maintaining websites using custom themes and plugins to meet client needs.

job4.description: During my internship, I had the opportunity to work in various areas of software development. I actively participated in creating and maintaining applications, collaborating with the team to solve problems and implement new features.

job5.description: I worked as a front-end developer using the Next.js framework along with Tailwind CSS and Material UI to structure and architect the project.

job6.description: I worked as a front-end developer focusing on creating interfaces that produce an innovative and functional experience for platform users.
job6.description2: I took responsibility for executing backend tests using Cypress, as well as starting the implementation of frontend tests with Ruby and Capybara.

job7.description: I worked as a Systems Analyst Assistant, focusing on component development and screen diagramming, contributing to the delivery of effective visual solutions.
job7.description2: I took responsibility for executing tests and validations of templates, ensuring proper functioning and visual consistency across all applications.

edu0.description: IT CST with theoretical-practical base in development and infrastructure areas. Emphasis on HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Java (OOP), MySQL, version control with Git/GitHub and agile methodologies (Scrum/Kanban).

edu1.description: Development of fluency and confidence for communication in English in professional contexts, access to content and immersion tools, and participation in mentoring and live sessions with executives.

edu2.description: Bachelor's degree in Systems Analysis and Development with a solid foundation in software and systems development.

edu3.description: Higher education with foundations in computing, software development (web and mobile), databases, software engineering, and networks.

edu4.description: Fullstack JavaScript Bootcamp with practical focus on front-end and back-end. Agile projects, version control with Git/GitHub and emphasis on soft skills.

edu5.description: Program for university students to accelerate their careers and leadership in academic communities through mentoring with market reference professionals.

edu6.description: Intensive Pro Profession program focused on employability, with personal development tracks, technical competencies, and market preparation.

edu7.institution: ETEC - State Technical School of São Paulo
edu7.description: Technical training with foundations in computing, software development, databases, software engineering, and networks.
